data.name: My Cute Commissar
data.detailed_description:
☭My Cute Commissar☭ 是一款带有“三消”玩法的历史讽刺类视觉小说。参与20世纪20年代苏俄的政治斗争！亲手夺取权力，让托洛茨基或斯大林坐上领导位置！深入了解早期苏维埃运动的领导者。点燃世界革命的火焰，或是在一国之内建设共产主义！选择权在你手中！♥

☭斯大林☭——一位年轻美丽的女孩，信奉共产主义理念，但并不相信世界革命。她渴望夺取权力，通过工业化和大清洗来在一国之内建设社会主义。♥

☭托洛茨基☭——一个天真少女，痴迷于永久革命和解放无产阶级。你可以说她是个狂热分子，但她看起来完全不像。权力和私利对她毫无吸引力。她唯一的目标：军事共产主义，以及让所有被压迫者获得自由——不惜一切代价！♥

游戏特色：

  • 20世纪20年代苏俄背景下的恋爱故事！

  • 多结局

  • 可爱的斯大林，以及更可爱的托洛茨基

  • 经典视觉小说 + 三消玩法

  • G374 创作的 Lo-fi Hip Hop 音乐

本作不包含任何政治组织的宣传、仇恨内容或官方符号。只有爱与相互理解。Make Match-3, not war ♥

data.short_description: ☭我的可爱委员☭ 是一款带有“三消”玩法的历史讽刺游戏。参与1920年代的共产俄罗斯政治斗争，阻止斯大林上台！
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 俄文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 烏克蘭文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz or faster
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0+ Compatible Card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2,28 Ghz or faste
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0+ Compatible Card
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: My Cute Commissar
data.detailed_description:
☭My Cute Commissar☭ is a satirical historical visual novel with “match-3” gameplay elements. Take part in the political struggle in 1920’s communist Russia! Take power into your own hands and bring Trotsky or Stalin to a ruling position! Get to know the leaders of the Russian communist movement intimately. Ignite the flames of world-wide revolution or build communism in one country! The choice is yours! ♥

☭Stalin☭ – a young, beautiful lady who follows the ideas of communism but does not believe in world-wide revolution. She wants to seize power and build communism in one country through industrialization and the Great Purge. ♥

☭Trotsky☭ – a naive girl obsessed with dreams of permanent revolution and freedom for the proletariat. You may call her a fanatic, but she certainly doesn’t look like one. Power and personal gain do not interest her at all. Her only goals: military communism and freedom for all oppressed people, no matter the cost! ♥

Features:

  • A love story in a 1920’s Russian setting!

  • Multiple endings

  • Cute Stalin and even cuter Trotsky

  • A classic visual novel with Match-3 gameplay

  • Lofi hip hop by G374

This game does not contain intolerance, political propaganda, or official symbols of any real political organizations. Only love and mutual understanding. Make Match-3, not war ♥

data.short_description: ☭My Cute Commissar☭ is a satirical historical visual novel with “match-3” gameplay. Take part in the political struggle of 1920s communist Russia and prevent Stalin’s tyrannical rule!
data.supported_languages:
English*, Russian*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Ukrainian
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7
  • Processor: 2.0 Ghz or faster
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0+ Compatible Card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: 2,28 Ghz or faste
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0+ Compatible Card
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
